name: Apple Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chops using melted pork fat trimmed from the meat and 1 teaspoon butter.
(Those concerned about their fat intake may use corn oil or another vegetable oil instead.)
2. Season to taste and place on a hot platter. Keep warm.
3. Slice the apples half an inch thick and add them to the pan with 1 teaspoon butter, sugar, and a few pinches of cinnamon or cloves.
4. Cook over medium heat for about 10 minutes, turning occasionally until some apples are browned.
5. Arrange the apples around the chops and serve. Serves: 4-6
"The apples keep the chops moist and tender." (Source: The Canadiana Cookbook by Mme. Jehane Benoit)
